temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) In a dimly lit bedroom, a young boy with shaggy brown hair, wearing a striped sweater over a plaid shirt, stands beside a bed. He holds a red marker and writes the name 'Rebecca' on the wooden headboard of the bed. In the background, a girl with blonde hair lies asleep under a blue comforter, her head propped up by a pillow. A bedside lamp casts a warm glow on the scene. (Storyline: The scene establishes a quiet, intimate moment between a brother and sister. The boy's action of writing the girl's name on her bed suggests a sense of ownership or affection, setting a slightly ominous tone.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Quiet, almost whispering. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
